SEARCH
Package view

Class BombView

java.lang.Object
view.BombView
public class BombView extends Object
Class about the view-part of the bombs, to pass the position without the need for the model and the view to communicate
Author:
Scarselli Ilaria, matricola 1918975

      public BufferedImage setup(String imageName)

      Parameters:
      imageName - the name of the image to substitute in the path for the resource folder
      Returns:
      the image

    • getSpriteCounter

      public int getSpriteCounter()
      Getter for the sprite counter (that counts the frames before having to change to the next sprite)
      Returns:
      the integer for the sprite counter

    • incrementSpriteCounter

      public void incrementSpriteCounter()
      Increments the sprite counter by one

    • resetSpriteCounter

      public void resetSpriteCounter()
      Method to reset the sprite counter after a certain period of time is elapsed

    • getSpriteNumber

      public int getSpriteNumber()
      Gets the sprite number
      Returns:
      an integer representing the sprite number

    • incrementSpriteNumber

      public void incrementSpriteNumber()
      Increment the sprite number by one

    • decrementSpriteNumber

      public void decrementSpriteNumber()
      Decrement the sprite number by one

    • resetSpriteNumber

      public void resetSpriteNumber()
      Resets the sprite number to 0

    • getX

      public int getX()
      Getter for the x coordinate of the bomb (the tile of the bomb)
      Returns:
      the x tile of the bomb

    • setX

      public void setX(int x)
      Sets the x coordinate of the bomb (expressed as the tile number)
      Parameters:
      x - the coordinate of the column where I want the image to be drawn

    • getY

      public int getY()
      Getter for the y coordinate of the bomb (the tile of the bomb)
      Returns:
      the y tile of the bomb

    • setY

      public void setY(int y)
      Sets the y coordinate of the bomb (expressed as the tile number)
      Parameters:
      y - the coordinate of the row where I want the image to be drawn
